degraded_reason: Single ready bead implemented directly by parent; independent Codex reviewer subagents used for review gate.
review_blocker_summary: First-pass reviewers requested clarification on premature ErrorHandler/failure-surface coupling, zero-value correlation merge semantics, and failure/cancellation call shapes.
Removed required ErrorHandler from the first contract, deferred hook reporting to failure-surface.md, defined non-empty correlation merge semantics, and added handle-level Error terminal shapes.
Second-pass consumer ergonomics review requested explicit cancellation shapes for all active handles.
Added Canceled bool/error examples for session, run, model call, stream, and tool call handles; focused third-pass review approved.
